summary: Mission v14.7 Testing Complete - Recherche et étanchéité contacts. 19/19 backend tests passed. Frontend UI verified: CoachVitrine search (case-insensitive + reset), CRM chat colors (Violet DROITE/Gris GAUCHE), dates fr-CH.
critical_code_review_comments: ✅ CoachVitrine.js Lines 864-869: toLowerCase() used for case-insensitive search (nameMatch, descMatch, keywordsMatch)
✅ CoachVitrine.js Lines 844-851: Reset button (✕) clears offerSearch state
✅ Backend server.py Lines 4344-4356: GET /chat/sessions filters by coach_id (Super Admin sees all)
✅ Backend server.py Lines 4410-4441: GET /conversations filters by coach_id (Super Admin sees all)
✅ Backend server.py Lines 5168-5198: POST /chat/generate-link adds coach_id to session
✅ Backend server.py Lines 3959-3970: GET /chat/participants filters by coach_id
✅ scheduler_engine.py Lines 363-365: Campaigns persisted in MongoDB (status scheduled)
✅ CRMSection.js Lines 670-685: Bulles colorées (Client=bg-gray-700 GAUCHE, Coach/IA=#D91CD2 DROITE)
seed_data_creation: TEST_ prefixed campaigns created and deleted during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Mission v14.7 fully verified. Key features: 1) CoachVitrine case-insensitive search with toLowerCase(), 2) Reset button (✕) clears search field, 3) Backend coach_id filtering on /chat/sessions, /conversations, /chat/participants, and /chat/generate-link, 4) Super Admin (contact.artboost@gmail.com) sees all data, partners see only their data, 5) Scheduler persists scheduled campaigns in MongoDB, 6) CRM chat colors (Client=Gris GAUCHE, Coach/IA=Violet DROITE), 7) Dates format fr-CH. Anti-regression: 8 contacts, 3 offers, reservations endpoint working.

backend_api: GET /chat/sessions with Super Admin header (sees all sessions)
GET /chat/sessions with Partner header (filtered by coach_id)
GET /conversations with Super Admin header (sees all conversations)
GET /conversations with Partner header (filtered by coach_id)
GET /chat/participants with Super Admin header (sees all)
GET /chat/participants with Partner header (filtered by coach_id)
POST /chat/generate-link with Partner (assigns partner email as coach_id)
frontend_ui: 3 offers visible with object-fit:cover images (Cours à l'unité, Carte 10 cours, Abonnement 1 mois)
code_review: scheduler_engine.py: Campaigns persisted with scheduled status (lines 363-365)

anti_regression_status.campaigns_status: scheduled campaigns created and tracked correctly

verified_v14_7_features.chat_sessions_coach_id_filter: ✅ Super Admin sees all, Partners filtered
verified_v14_7_features.conversations_coach_id_filter: ✅ Super Admin sees all, Partners filtered
verified_v14_7_features.chat_participants_coach_id_filter: ✅ Super Admin sees all, Partners filtered
